---
title: "ui.py"
path: "C:\Users\Craig\Corvus\CorvusStar\src\games\odin_protocol\ui.py"
loc: 89
complexity: 15
logic_score: 1.25
style_score: 3.52
intel_score: 3.20
overall_score: 1.57
---

## Intent
The `ui.py` sector implements high-complexity logic focusing on OdinUI, render_manifest, briefing. It forms a critical node in the Gungnir Matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Integrate via OdinUI, render_manifest, briefing. Follow the Linscott Standard for this sector.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 1.3/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.5/10
- **Intel [I]**: 3.2/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 4 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [os](file://os)
- [time](file://time)
- [rich.console](file://rich.console)
- [src.core.sovereign_hud](file://src.core.sovereign_hud)
- [src.games.odin_protocol.engine](file://src.games.odin_protocol.engine)

### Exports
- `OdinUI`
- `render_manifest`
- `briefing`
